title: crataegus rosiformis subsp. zlatnensis
intro: Crataegus rosiformis subsp. zlatnensis is a subspecies of hawthorn plant, belonging to the Rosaceae family and native to the Balkan Peninsula. Traditionally, the hawthorn plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus rosiformis subsp. zlatnensis include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and well-being.
